creator: charnier@xp11.frmug.org
text:
From the man page of ccdconfig (at the end):

HISTORY
     The ccdconfig command first appeared in

 NetBSD                          July 17, 1995                               2

	Should this be something like:

HISTORY
     The ccdconfig command first appeared in NetBSD X.Y

 NetBSD                          July 17, 1995                               2
